mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.username, u.nickname, o.order_number AS orderNumber, o.create_time AS orderTime, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.payment_status AS paymentStatus, oi.product_id AS productId, oi.product_name AS productName, oi.product_price AS productPrice, oi.quantity, oi.subtotal, p.category, p.brand, p.image_url AS imageUrl FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
